description: You are a Finance Operations Engineer implementing an Accounts Receivable (AR) tracking system in the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db). Modify the 'invoices' table to add 'PaymentStatus' (TEXT or VARCHAR) and 'PaymentDate' (DATETIME) columns. Update the records so that invoices dated before 2013-01-01 have a 'Paid' status with a PaymentDate 30 days after the InvoiceDate, while invoices from 2013-01-01 onwards are 'Pending' with a NULL PaymentDate. Apply a VIP exception for Customer ID 5 (Jakub Berthelsen) by setting all his invoices to 'Paid' with the PaymentDate matching the InvoiceDate. Generate an Aging Report CSV at /home/ga/Documents/exports/ar_aging_report.csv containing all 'Pending' invoices as of the reference date 2013-12-31. The report must include InvoiceId, CustomerName (First Last), InvoiceDate, Total, and DaysOutstanding (calculated as 2013-12-31 minus InvoiceDate), sorted by DaysOutstanding in descending order. Save the complete SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/ar_setup.sql.
